name: COVID Vaccine Injury Site - Workflow Collection
description: n8n workflows for automating notifications and data management

workflows.name: Survey Submission Alert
workflows.description: Sends email/Slack notification when a new survey is submitted

values.subject: New Survey Submission

workflows.name: Contact Form Alert
workflows.description: Immediate notification when someone submits the contact form

config.subject: New Contact Form: {{$json.subject}}

workflows.name: New Subscriber Welcome
workflows.description: Sends welcome email to new newsletter subscribers

config.subject: Welcome to U.S. COVID Vaccine Injuries Updates
config.html:
Thank you for subscribing, {{$json.name}}!

You'll now receive updates about our advocacy efforts for fair compensation for vaccine-injured Americans.

What you can do now:

  • Share your story via our survey
  • Contact your representatives
  • Support our mission

Together, we can make a difference.

workflows.name: Daily Survey Stats Summary
workflows.description: Sends daily summary of survey statistics

workflows.name: Weekly Data Export
workflows.description: Exports survey data to Google Sheets weekly

workflows.name: Donation Received Alert
workflows.description: Notification when a donation is completed

config.subject: 🎉 New Donation Received - ${{$json.amount}}
config.html:
New Donation!

Amount: ${{$json.amount}}

Recurring: {{$json.recurring ? 'Yes (monthly)' : 'One-time'}}

Email: {{$json.email}}

Thank the donor and keep up the great work!

setup_instructions.step2: Create a new workflow for each item above
setup_instructions.step3: Configure email credentials (SMTP or service like SendGrid)
setup_instructions.step6: Add webhook calls to the Next.js API routes

api_integration.description: Add these webhook calls to your API routes
